title: Pasania milroyi

Additionally, it is used to treat various other ailments due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.

intro: Pasania milroyi, also known as Indian walnut or Himalayan walnut, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fagaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Pasania milroyi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Pasania milroyi is commonly prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
